final:
// // This submodule implements a transparent latch, bypassing the enable signal.
module top_latch_module(
    input d,
    input enable,
    output reg q);always @(d or enable) begin
        if (enable) begin
            q <= d;
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This submodule implements a transparent latch, bypassing the enable signal.
